hero.sub: Incredible places with people who make it worth it.

destinationsGrid.title: Where are we going?
destinationsGrid.subtitle: Group trips to authentic destinations, working with locals to immerse ourselves in their culture and traditions.

about.title: Who we are
about.desc1: We are two passionate travelers who turned their love of discovering the world into a different way of traveling. At Awayna we create authentic experiences where what matters is not just the destination, but the people you meet and the moments you share.
about.desc2: We travel slowly, mixing with locals and looking for those small details that make each trip unique. Because when you connect with the place and the group, the trip transforms into something that stays with you forever.

footer.tagline: Group trips for young adventurers. Discover the world with people like you and create memories that will last a lifetime.

cookieBanner.title: Your privacy matters
cookieBanner.desc: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. By accepting, you help us offer you the best trips.
cookieBanner.moreInfo: More information about our cookie policy

destPage.itinerarySubtitle: A carefully designed trip so you live unique experiences every day
destPage.includesSubtitle: Everything you need to enjoy without worries
destPage.practicalSubtitle: Everything you need to know before traveling
destPage.depositNote: Only €200 deposit · Balance due 30 days before
destPage.reason1: We care about the how, not just the where
destPage.reason2: We are people, not an agency
destPage.fondoComunDesc: Upon arrival, we create a shared fund of approximately €150, which covers shared expenses during the trip. If it runs out, we all top it up; and if there's anything left at the end, it's split among the group.
destPage.fondoComunCovers: What does the shared fund cover?
destPage.fondoComunActivities: Activities the group decides to do on the go that are not in the itinerary
destPage.fondoComunTransport: Occasional transport (taxis, tuk-tuks…) and government fees not included, such as national park entrances, churches, etc.
destPage.comingSoonDesc: We are finalizing the best option for you. Dates, itineraries and prices coming soon.
destPage.comingSoonContact: If you have any questions, contact us!

about.metaTitle: About Us | Awayna - Founders of Authentic Travel
about.metaDesc: Meet Iván and Alejandro, the founders of Awayna. Discover our mission to create unique group trips.
about.headline: Less tourism. More travel.
about.desc1: For us, traveling isn't about checking places off a list—it's about truly living them. We like to move slowly, mix with local people, try new flavors and let the destination set the pace. We seek adventures, yes, but also quiet moments, shared laughs and that feeling of being exactly where you need to be.
about.desc2: We travel with good vibes, open minds and a real desire to discover the world from the inside. We like to show destinations as they really are, without forced filters or rush, focusing on experiences, people and the small details that make each trip unique. Because when you connect with the place and the group, the trip transforms into something that stays with you forever.
about.ivanBio: Iván is approachable and laid-back, with an adventurous spirit and infinite curiosity. From a young age he devoured documentaries, and that pushed him to leave his job to discover the world camera in hand. Photography is his way of looking and telling what he lives. His first solo trip was to India, where he trained as a yoga instructor, something he carries to every destination. He firmly believes that when there are good vibes, everything else flows on its own.
about.alexBio: Alex is simple and very clear about what he wants in life. He loves nature, the outdoors and discovering new cultures, especially if there's good food involved. He's talkative, fun and has the soul of an explorer, needing to cover every corner of the destinations he visits. He has endless energy, so sport always goes in his bag. He seems to improvise and go with the flow, but deep down he has everything well thought out. An easy-going, curious travel companion with great vibes.

faq.metaDesc: We answer all your questions before traveling with Awayna.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before traveling with Awayna. If you don't find your answer, write to us.
faq.ctaDesc: Write to us and we'll answer before you make up your mind.

cancellation.metaDesc: Check our cancellation policy. Learn about deadlines, conditions and what happens to your booking.
cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.subtitle: We want you to travel with peace of mind. That's why our conditions are clear and without fine print.
cancellation.ctaDesc: Our team is available to help you before you make any decision.
cancellation.step1Desc: You pay the deposit plus the security bond (40% of the total price). Your spot is confirmed and the trip is on.
cancellation.step2Desc: You can cancel your trip at any time before this date. You won't have to pay the remaining amount. However, the deposit and security bond are non-refundable.
cancellation.step3Desc: The remaining 60% of the total price is charged. From this point the trip is fully confirmed and paid.
cancellation.summary1: When booking you pay 40% of the total price (deposit + bond). Your spot is locked in.
cancellation.summary2: 30 days before the trip the remaining 60% is charged to fully confirm your spot.
cancellation.summary3: If you cancel before the 30-day mark, you won't need to pay the remaining amount, but the deposit and bond already paid are non-refundable.
cancellation.warning: Once the 30 days before the trip have passed and the final payment has been made, the full amount is non-refundable. If you have any questions or special circumstances, write to us before making any decision.

cookies.metaDesc: Information about the use of cookies on awayna.com.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.introText: At Awayna we use cookies and similar technologies on our website (awayna.com). This page explains what they are, what types we use and how you can control them. We want to be transparent about this because we believe you should decide.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, mobile or tablet) when you visit a website. They help the site remember information about your visit: preferences, settings or activity. Some are necessary for the site to work; others are optional and require your consent.
cookies.durationText: According to their duration, cookies can be:
cookies.sessionText: automatically deleted when you close the browser.
cookies.persistentText: remain on your device for a set period (days, months or until you manually delete them).
cookies.manageTitle: How to manage or delete cookies?
cookies.manageText: You have full control over cookies. You can accept, reject or configure them at any time from the cookie banner that appears when you enter the site, or directly from your browser settings:
cookies.manageNote: Please note that blocking or deleting certain cookies may affect the functionality of the site.
cookies.legalText: The use of cookies on this site is regulated by the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union and the Spanish Law on Information Society Services (LSSI). Technical cookies don't require consent; analytical and marketing cookies do.
cookies.updatesText: We may update this cookie policy to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. When we make changes, we'll update the date at the top of this page.
cookies.ctaDesc: If you'd like to know more about how we handle your data or have any questions about this policy, write to us.
cookies.cookie1Desc: Essential for the website to function correctly. Without them, certain parts of the site wouldn't work. They don't require your consent.
cookies.cookie2Desc: Allow us to understand how visitors interact with the site: which pages they visit, how long they stay, where they come from. This data helps us improve the site. Data is anonymous and aggregated.
cookies.cookie3Desc: Used to show you relevant ads on other sites and social networks based on your interests. They also help us measure the effectiveness of our campaigns.
cookies.cookie4Desc: Some site features (embedded videos, maps, social media buttons) may install third-party cookies. We don't directly control these cookies; we recommend reviewing each service's policies.
